resources.string: New stable and beta releases for Call Nest.
Quiet status while Call Nest syncs your call log.
Active during a phone call to surface caller context.
Calls land in your call log. Call Nest catches them, saves them, and turns them into leads — automatically.
Keep using your phone — we\'ll finish in the background.
You said no, and we respect that. But Call Nest can\'t read your calls without permission.
Open Settings → Permissions → Allow Call log, Contacts, and Phone state. We\'ll pick up where you left off.
Inbound, outbound, missed — every number is logged with SIM and time.
New unsaved callers land in your contacts in seconds, named the way you like.
See lead scores, schedule reminders, and never let a hot lead go cold.
A few permissions, then we\'re set.
Everything stays on your device. Call Nest never uploads your data.
To import and track every inquiry call you receive.
To match callers to people you already know.
To detect which SIM each call came in on, on dual-SIM devices.
So follow-up reminders and new-inquiry alerts can reach you.
%1$s aggressively closes background apps. One quick toggle stops it from killing Call Nest.
Reading your call log — large histories (10 000+) may take a minute. You can keep using your phone; we\'ll keep working in the background.
All caught up. Welcome to Call Nest.
We couldn\'t finish the first import.
Call Nest needs a couple of permissions.
Without these, Call Nest can\'t see your inquiry calls. Tap Grant to enable them — your data never leaves the device.
You\'ve declined a permission Call Nest needs. Re-enable it in Settings — we\'ll bring you right back here.
The full inquiry list lands in Sprint 3 — search, filters, lead scores and all.
Pull down to sync your call log.
Clear all data for this number
This permanently removes every call, note and tag for this number. This cannot be undone.
Try a number, name, or note keyword
Your recent searches will appear here.
Try a number, name, or note keyword.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
We couldn\'t start the sync. Try again in a moment.
Tags help you sort inquiries from customers, vendors, and follow-ups. Tap the + to create your first one.
This tag is applied to %1$d calls. Delete anyway?
This tag isn\'t applied to any calls. Delete it?
All calls tagged %1$s will be re-tagged. The original tag will be removed.
Tag names are limited to 24 characters.
No tags yet — tap below to create one.
Tap the star on any call to bookmark it. Pinned bookmarks appear here for one-tap access.
You can pin up to 5 bookmarks. Unpin one to add another.
A short note helps you remember why this caller mattered.
Write a note. Markdown is supported.
This can\'t be undone — the previous version is kept in history for 5 edits.
All caught up. No follow-ups due today.
Time to follow up on this inquiry.
Couldn\'t schedule reminder. Allow exact alarms?
Android is throttling our exact-alarm permission. Tap to allow it for on-time follow-ups.
Saved contacts from your phone will appear here once your call log syncs.
Auto-saved unsaved callers land here. Turn auto-save on in settings to populate this list.
This contact will move to My Contacts with the name you choose.
Call Nest will quietly save every new caller as a contact, named the way you choose.
Tap + to add your first auto-tag rule. Rules apply tags, boost lead score, or schedule follow-ups when calls match the conditions you choose.
When all of these are true…
Live preview: matches %1$d of the latest 200 calls.
Show a tappable bubble during a call to take notes on the fly.
Open a quick popup right after a call to tag, note, or save.
Skip the popup for contacts you already have.
Display over other apps: Not granted
This will replace all your data. Continue?
Couldn\'t back up. Set a passphrase first.
Once-a-day digest of your call activity.
Type DELETE to wipe all Call Nest data on this device. Your call log and contacts in the OS are not affected.
You\'ll need to sign in again to access your Call Nest data.
Something went wrong while crunching the numbers. Try again in a moment.
Every call your phone has logged.
Numbers Call Nest auto-saved for you.
Your call volume and lead quality.
Automatic tagging that runs every sync.
When all conditions match, do these actions.
How Call Nest names new inquiries.
Tune what makes a hot lead.
Backups are encrypted with your passphrase before upload — nothing readable leaves your device.
Sign in to your Call Nest account.
I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
Enter the email you signed up with — we\'ll send a reset link.
We sent a reset link to %1$s. Tap the link to set a new password.
Waiting for the recovery link to verify…
This recovery link has expired. Request a new one from the Forgot password screen.
We sent a confirmation link to %1$s. Tap the link, then come back here.
%1$d calls · %2$d hot leads. Open for the breakdown.
Monday 9 AM rollup of your last 7 days.
Top concerns you flagged this week
Enable AI summary in Settings → Privacy and add your Claude API key.
No API key set. Add it in Settings → Privacy.
Sends only aggregate counts + first names + tag names to Claude (your API key, BYOK). No call notes or phone numbers leave the device.
High-priority alert when a top lead calls.
Notify when a known top lead calls (score ≥ 70 or in Qualified/Won).
Expected: one row per contact. Columns: name, phone — header optional. Phone column accepts +91 / 10-digit Indian numbers.
Skipped rows are missing a phone or have invalid format.
Permission denied. Enable "Contacts" in app settings, then try again.
Manual override is on. Disable it to use the computed score.
How can I improve this score?
How each factor contributed to the 0–100 lead score for this contact.
All contacts with overdue follow-ups will be moved to the Lost stage. You can move any back manually.
Tap "Open" on each. WhatsApp opens with the message pre-filled — you tap Send there.
WhatsApp isn\'t installed on this device.
Message body — use {name} to insert the contact\'s name
No custom templates yet. Built-ins above are always available.
Tag a few inquiry calls or auto-save them — they\'ll show up here as leads.
A few sample contacts so you can explore. Clear them when you\'re ready.
Two columns: name and phone. We\'ll preview before importing.
Authenticate to access your call vault.
Use fingerprint, face, or device PIN.
App lock is enabled, but this device has no biometrics or PIN configured. Set one up, or disable App lock to continue.
Require biometrics or PIN to open the app.
This permanently removes your Call Nest account and all server-side data. Local call data on this device is not affected. Enter your password to confirm.
